title: Consider a decision afresh
applicationTitle: Apply to have a decision considered afresh
genericGuidanceRep: Upload letters, photos or documents if they are relevant to the claimant’s application. Do not upload any other material.
contactApplicationTextRep: Give details of the claimant’s application in the text box or upload a file

content.text: Use this form to have a judgment or order made by a legal officer considered afresh by an Employment Judge.
Considered afresh means that if you disagree with a judgment or order made by a legal officer in your case, you can ask an Employment Judge to look at that decision again.
The judge will take the decision afresh on the basis of the same information as was before the legal officer, unless either side chooses to supply additional information.
Details to include in your application:

items: the decision you want considered afresh
the date the tribunal issued the decision
why you want the decision considered afresh

Considered afresh means that if the claimant disagrees with a judgment or order made by a legal officer in their case, they can ask an Employment Judge to look at that decision again.
The judge will take the decision afresh on the basis of the same information as was before the legal officer, unless either side chooses to supply additional information.
Details to include in your application:

items: the decision the claimant wants considered afresh
the date the tribunal issued the decision
why the claimant wants the decision considered afresh
